languages.text: {n}Ясно одно: надлежит сокрушить ложь, которой лукавые ксеносы опутали все сущее, и разорвать временную петлю. Лорду-капитану не пристало пребывать в ловушке дольше, нежели он сам пожелает.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Ясно одно: надлежит сокрушить ложь, которой лукавые ксеносы опутали все сущее, и разорвать временную петлю. Лорду-капитану не пристало пребывать в ловушке дольше, нежели он сам пожелает.{/n}

languages.text: {n}One thing is clear: the lies that the devious xenos used to entangle existence must be sundered, and the time loop must be broken. The Lord Captain will not deign to spend any longer in this trap than {mf|he|she} wishes.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Ясно одно: надлежит сокрушить ложь, которой лукавые ксеносы опутали все сущее, и разорвать временную петлю. Лорду-капитану не пристало пребывать в ловушке дольше, нежели он сам пожелает.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}One thing is clear: the lies that the devious xenos used to entangle existence must be sundered, and the time loop must be broken. The Lord Captain will not deign to spend any longer in this trap than {mf|he|she} wishes.{/n}

{n}One thing is clear: the lies that the devious xenos used to entangle existence must be sundered, and the time loop must be broken. The Lord Captain will not deign to spend any longer in this trap than {mf|he|she} wishes.{/n}

{n}One thing is clear: the lies that the devious xenos used to entangle existence must be sundered, and the time loop must be broken. The Lord Captain will not deign to spend any longer in this trap than {mf|he|she} wishes.{/n}

languages.text: {n}有一点毋庸置疑，这些狡诈的异形用来扭曲现实的谎言必须被撕碎，时间循环必须被打破。舰长大人可不会屈尊在这种陷阱里多待一秒，除非{mf|他|她}自己愿意。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}One thing is clear: the lies that the devious xenos used to entangle existence must be sundered, and the time loop must be broken. The Lord Captain will not deign to spend any longer in this trap than {mf|he|she} wishes.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}有一点毋庸置疑，这些狡诈的异形用来扭曲现实的谎言必须被撕碎，时间循环必须被打破。舰长大人可不会屈尊在这种陷阱里多待一秒，除非{mf|他|她}自己愿意。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Une chose est claire : le tissu de mensonges que les perfides xénos ont utilisé pour embrouiller la réalité doit être déchiré, et la boucle temporelle brisée. {mf|Le seigneur-capitaine|La seigneure-capitaine} ne daignera pas perdre une seconde de plus que nécessaire dans ce piège.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}One thing is clear: the lies that the devious xenos used to entangle existence must be sundered, and the time loop must be broken. The Lord Captain will not deign to spend any longer in this trap than {mf|he|she} wishes.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Une chose est claire : le tissu de mensonges que les perfides xénos ont utilisé pour embrouiller la réalité doit être déchiré, et la boucle temporelle brisée. {mf|Le seigneur-capitaine|La seigneure-capitaine} ne daignera pas perdre une seconde de plus que nécessaire dans ce piège.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Bir şey apaçık ortada: Sinsi zenoların varoluşu düğümlemek için attığı yalanlar paramparça edilmeli ve zaman döngüsü kırılmalıdır. Lord Kaptan, bu tuzağın içinde dilediğinden uzun kalmaya tenezzül etmez.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}One thing is clear: the lies that the devious xenos used to entangle existence must be sundered, and the time loop must be broken. The Lord Captain will not deign to spend any longer in this trap than {mf|he|she} wishes.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Bir şey apaçık ortada: Sinsi zenoların varoluşu düğümlemek için attığı yalanlar paramparça edilmeli ve zaman döngüsü kırılmalıdır. Lord Kaptan, bu tuzağın içinde dilediğinden uzun kalmaya tenezzül etmez.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Una cosa queda clara. Las mentiras que los astutos xenos usaron para enmarañar la existencia deben quebrantarse y el bucle temporal debe cesar. {mf|El|La} Lord Capitán no pasará más tiempo en esta trampa del que desee.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}One thing is clear: the lies that the devious xenos used to entangle existence must be sundered, and the time loop must be broken. The Lord Captain will not deign to spend any longer in this trap than {mf|he|she} wishes.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Una cosa queda clara. Las mentiras que los astutos xenos usaron para enmarañar la existencia deben quebrantarse y el bucle temporal debe cesar. {mf|El|La} Lord Capitán no pasará más tiempo en esta trampa del que desee.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Eines ist klar: Die Lügen, mit denen die teuflischen Xenos die Existenz fesseln, müssen aufgedeckt und die Zeitschleife muss durchbrochen werden. Der Lord Captain wird nicht länger in dieser Falle verweilen, als es {mf|ihm|ihr} beliebt.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}One thing is clear: the lies that the devious xenos used to entangle existence must be sundered, and the time loop must be broken. The Lord Captain will not deign to spend any longer in this trap than {mf|he|she} wishes.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Eines ist klar: Die Lügen, mit denen die teuflischen Xenos die Existenz fesseln, müssen aufgedeckt und die Zeitschleife muss durchbrochen werden. Der Lord Captain wird nicht länger in dieser Falle verweilen, als es {mf|ihm|ihr} beliebt.{/n}

languages.text: {n}一つは明らかです。悪意のある異種族が存在を絡ませるために使った嘘は断ち切られ、時間ループは破られるでしょう。主船長は、この罠に留まる時間を望むだけにするでしょう。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}One thing is clear: the lies that the devious xenos used to entangle existence must be sundered, and the time loop must be broken. The Lord Captain will not deign to spend any longer in this trap than {mf|he|she} wishes.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}一つは明らかです。悪意のある異種族が存在を絡ませるために使った嘘は断ち切られ、時間ループは破られるでしょう。主船長は、この罠に留まる時間を望むだけにするでしょう。{/n}
